title: Use of Grass Biorefinery Whey in Fertilizer and Bioenergy Applications
subtitle: Zero-Waste Biorefinery Approach
description: A study evaluating the utilization of residual whey from grass biorefineries as both a bio-fertilizer and a feedstock for anaerobic digestion to produce bioenergy. It details biogas and biomethane potentials from grass whey and compares its effectiveness to cattle slurry in field trials.
